## 📊 Impact Assessment

- **Documentation Impact**: <!-- What docs need updates? -->

## 🏷️ Labels

- [ ] `type/feature` - New feature
- [ ] `type/enhancement` - Improvement to existing feature
- [ ] `type/performance` - Performance optimization
- [ ] `type/security` - Security enhancement
- [ ] `type/api` - API change
- [ ] `type/infra` - Infrastructure improvement
- [ ] `priority/high` - High priority
- [ ] `priority/medium` - Medium priority
- [ ] `priority/low` - Low priority

<!-- Link to related issues or PRs if applicable -->

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I've searched for similar feature requests
- [ ] I've described the use case clearly
- [ ] I've considered the implementation impact
- [ ] This is aligned with project scope
